items.mistake: Doing heavy CPU work directly on the main thread.
items.fix: Offload to worker threads or a separate service.
items.why: CPU-bound tasks block the event loop and stall all other requests.

items.fix: Pick a module system (set "type": "module" for ESM) and stay consistent.
items.why: CJS/ESM interop issues cause confusing import errors.
items.example: ESM file `index.mjs` doing `const x = require('./a')` → `ReferenceError: require is not defined`. Either rename to `.cjs` or use `import x from './a.js'`.

items.mistake: Hard-coding secrets instead of using process.env.
items.fix: Read keys from process.env (and a .env loader in dev).
items.why: Keeps secrets out of source and configurable per environment.

items.mistake: Calling provider APIs from the browser with the key.
items.fix: Make the call from Node server-side.
items.why: Server-side keeps the API key hidden from users.
items.example: `fetch('https://api.openai.com/...', { headers: { Authorization: 'Bearer sk-...' }})` in browser code → the key is in DevTools network tab. Proxy via a Node endpoint: browser → your `/api/chat` → OpenAI (key never leaves the server).
